title: Implement SIMD-accelerated FieldVec operations with delayed reduction
description:
Add SIMD-accelerated operations to the generic FieldVec<F: FiniteField> container (54a60c90). Implement vectorized dot product with delayed reduction — perform polynomial multiplication and XOR/addition accumulation, reducing modulo P(x) only at the end. This is the SIMD optimization layer on top of the scalar generic container.

Depends on generic FieldVec (54a60c90) and carry-less multiplication SIMD kernels (055bda14).
